scripts.build: npm run generate:host && npm run build:assets && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:harness
scripts.build:dev: npm run generate:host && npm run build:assets && npm run build:wasm:dev && npm run build:harness
scripts.publish: npm run generate:host && npm run build:assets && npm run build:wasm:publish && npm run build:harness && npm run publish:stage
scripts.build:wasm: npm run build:wasm:home && npm run build:wasm:settings
scripts.build:wasm:dev: npm run build:wasm:dev:home && npm run build:wasm:dev:settings
scripts.build:wasm:publish: npm run build:wasm:publish:home && npm run build:wasm:publish:settings
scripts.generate:host: npm run generate:host-services && npm run generate:host-events
scripts.publish:stage: rm -rf published && mkdir -p published && cp -R public/. published/ && cp -f index.html published/index.html && cp -f route-shell.html published/route-shell.html
scripts.dev: npm run build:dev && concurrently -k -n watch,serve "npm run watch" "npm run serve"
